title: Welltower 2024 Annual Report
note: Primary annual filing-style source for Welltower's property portfolio, real estate assets, impairments, dispositions, and segment context.

title: Welltower Reports Fourth Quarter 2025 Results
note: Investor update describing 2025 senior housing investment activity, outpatient medical portfolio sale activity, dividend continuity, and 2026 guidance assumptions.

title: Welltower Statistics and Valuation
note: Market-data source for current market capitalization, PE ratio, leverage, and profitability ratios.

title: What is openMAINT
note: Open-source property and facility-management project relevant to decentralized operation of senior housing and medical office assets.

title: OpenEMR
note: Open-source medical record and practice-management software relevant to outpatient clinic infrastructure.

title: Senior Cooperative Housing Resources
note: Background source for senior housing cooperative models and resident-centered alternatives to investor-owned senior living real estate.
